source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
title: Ensure Image Vulnerability Scanning using ACR image scanning or a third party provider

input_row.source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
input_row.title: Ensure Image Vulnerability Scanning using ACR image scanning or a third party provider
input_row.description: Scan	images	stored	in	Alibaba	Cloud	Container	Registry	(ACR)	for	vulnerabilities.
input_row.rationale: Vulnerabilities	in	software	packages	can	be	exploited	by	hackers	or	malicious	users	to obtain	unauthorized	access	to	local	cloud	resources.	ACR	Container	Analysis	and	other third	party	products	allow	images	stored	in	ACR	to	be	scanned	for	known	vulnerabilities. Impact: None.
input_row.audit: Using	Alibaba	Cloud	Console 1. Go	to	ACR	by	visiting	https://cr.console.aliyun.com/ 2. Configure	the	basic	information	of	chain 3. Configure	image	security	scanning	rule
input_row.remediation: Using	Alibaba	Cloud	Console 1. Go	to	ACR	by	visiting	https://cr.console.aliyun.com/ 2. Configure	the	basic	information	of	chain 3. Configure	image	security	scanning	rule Default	Value: 249	|	P a g e By	default,	ACR	Container	Analysis	is	disabled. References: 1. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/160146.htm CIS	Controls: Version	7 3	Continuous	Vulnerability	Management Continuous	Vulnerability	Management 3.1	Run	Automated	Vulnerability	Scanning	Tools Utilize	an	up-to-date	SCAP-compliant	vulnerability	scanning	tool	to	automatically	scan	all systems	on	the	network	on	a	weekly	or	more	frequent	basis	to	identify	all	potential vulnerabilities	on	the	organization's	systems. 3.2	Perform	Authenticated	Vulnerability	Scanning Perform	authenticated	vulnerability	scanning	with	agents	running	locally	on	each	system or	with	remote	scanners	that	are	configured	with	elevated	rights	on	the	system	being tested. 250	|	P a g e
input_row.references: 1. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/160146.htm CIS	Controls: Version	7 3	Continuous	Vulnerability	Management Continuous	Vulnerability	Management 3.1	Run	Automated	Vulnerability	Scanning	Tools Utilize	an	up-to-date	SCAP-compliant	vulnerability	scanning	tool	to	automatically	scan	all systems	on	the	network	on	a	weekly	or	more	frequent	basis	to	identify	all	potential vulnerabilities	on	the	organization's	systems. 3.2	Perform	Authenticated	Vulnerability	Scanning Perform	authenticated	vulnerability	scanning	with	agents	running	locally	on	each	system or	with	remote	scanners	that	are	configured	with	elevated	rights	on	the	system	being tested. 250	|	P a g e

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**APPROACH DECISION:**
- Alibaba Cloud Container Registry (ACR) supports vulnerability scanning, which can be checked using Alibaba Cloud APIs or CLI tools.
- The description and audit steps refer to configuring ACR for image scanning, which implies that API calls can be leveraged to verify this configuration.
- Aliyun CLI or Alibaba Cloud CLI can likely be used to query the ACR configuration to validate that vulnerability scanning is enabled.
- Considering standard practices and available references, vulnerability management often falls within capabilities exposed to automation via cloud APIs.

**PROGRAM NAME:** ali_acr_repository_vulnerability_scanning_enabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Use Alibaba Cloud CLI or APIs to query the ACR repository configuration. 
- Check for the existence and settings of image vulnerability scanning within each ACR repository.
- Enumerate all ACR repositories across relevant regions.
- Validate that image scanning is enabled for automated vulnerability detection.
- Pass/Fail Criteria:
  - Pass: Image vulnerability scanning is enabled for repositories.
  - Fail: Image vulnerability scanning is not enabled.
- Example CLI Command: Use `aliyun cr DescribeRepositories --region <region>` to list repositories and verify scanning configurations.
- Potential API Call: Use the ACR APIs to check the `ListImageVulnerabilities` function, ensuring that scanning rules are set and active.
